body:
🔴 **Tool Issue** — `CHANGELOG.md:4`
`Compared with version 2.1.0`

The last released stable version was `2.1.1 (2025-08-22)`, not `2.1.0`. The `2.1.1` release entry has also been removed from the changelog history, which loses release record information.

**Fix:** Update line 4 to `Compared with version 2.1.1`, restore the `## 2.1.1 (2025-08-22)` entry below the new version section, and report this in the [generation tool repository](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.typescript/issues).

1 tool issue found in this PR (`@azure/arm-serialconsole` v3.0.0-beta.1, API version 2024-07-01). The package is being regenerated from TypeSpec and migrated to the new `@azure-rest/core-client` emitter. Versions are consistently aligned across `package.json`, the context file, and `CHANGELOG.md`. No naming, type-safety, or export issues were found in the public API surface.

<details>
<summary>📊 Structured Report</summary>

```json
{"agent":"mgmt-reviewer","pr":37795,"summary":"issues_found","findings":[{"file":"sdk/serialconsole/arm-serialconsole/CHANGELOG.md","line":4,"issueType":"tool","category":"changelog","description":"'Compared with version 2.1.0' is incorrect — last released stable was 2.1.1 (2025-08-22). The 2.1.1 changelog entry was also removed."}]}
```

</details>
